architecture.title: Capability-driven edge lifecycle
architecture.body: A stable framework, thin adapters, and evidence kept separate from assumptions.
architecture.alt: Architecture card showing framework policy flowing through a verified adapter to an edge runtime.

recovery.title: Recovery without a working proxy
recovery.body: Verified offline inputs keep the recovery path independent from proxy-only downloads.
recovery.alt: Recovery card showing an offline cache feeding a router edge while endpoint fallback remains independent.

safety.title: Bounded automation
safety.body: Plan, confirm, apply, verify, and roll back. Human trust decisions stay human.
safety.alt: Safety card showing plan, confirmation, apply, verification, and rollback as a bounded loop.

evidence.title: Evidence before claims
evidence.body: Linux, macOS, and Windows checks cover local behavior, release integrity, and public boundaries.
evidence.alt: Evidence card listing Linux, macOS, Windows, release integrity, and boundary verification.

summary.title: A recoverable home edge
summary.body: Router-primary, endpoint fallback, adapter-ready, and explicit about what is not proven.
summary.alt: Square summary connecting a router-primary edge to independent endpoint fallback and verification evidence.
